title: Adding restriction automations
excerpt: We have multiple levels of employees able to access certain boards, but we don’t want everyone to be able to select certain statuses, such as Complete-Close Case. I would like to be able to set up restrictions that keep …

posts.author: cmjones (Cylie Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: We have multiple levels of employees able to access certain boards, but we don’t want everyone to be able to select certain statuses, such as Complete-Close Case. I would like to be able to set up restrictions that keep cases from being moved into certain groups unless it is a certain person trying to move them or the ability to set up restriction automations that will not let cases get moved into certain groups unless certain columns are filled in.
